content.en:
"There are still many reincarnation heavenly liquids, there should be hope to raise my other side origin rules to the ninety percent seven realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His replica body continues to cultivate here.

However, he was ready to continue deep into the depths of this Void Treasure Land.

In these years, he not only explored the territory of the reincarnation ancient snake, but also explored other places one by one, and obtained a lot of resources and treasures, the number of which was unimaginable.

Among them, the treasures that are second only to the reincarnation heavenly liquid and help to comprehend the original rules of the other side, he has obtained several kinds.

But as his cultivation improves, and the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side increases, these resources will gradually lose their effect, and he will definitely need more precious treasures at that time.

That's why he wanted to go deep into the depths of this Void Treasure Land.

......

Ye Tian entered the depths of this Void Treasure Land as a copy of the body of the Reincarnation Ancient Snake, and dense plants appeared around here.

Rumble!!!!

Countless plants are strangled, and each plant is a kind of life, with a very strong strength, definitely no less than the reincarnation of the heavenly vine.

Although his copying talent sensed these plants, he still didn't have time to escape and was directly killed.

"This area is too terrifying, there are too many plants similar to the reincarnation of the heavenly vine, their cultivation is too high, I can't replicate it at the moment, give up this area and enter from another area. "

Chen Yang copied a reincarnation ancient snake again and entered from the other end.

This time, he came to an endless sea of sand, where every grain of sand was as heavy as a world.

However, for Ye Tian, this sand is of little use, and it is not a treasure.

He walked into the endless sea of sand, and then quickly shuttled.

Abrupt.

Dense black insects came out of the endless sea of sand and attacked Ye Tian one after another.

The origin of these bugs can be known from the copy talent.

【Reincarnation Sandworm】

The strength of these reincarnation sandworms is not weak, the ordinary ones are comparable to the Origin Lower Realm, the powerful ones are comparable to the Origin Upper Realm, and they also have a small number of reincarnation sandworms with the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

In an instant, Ye Tian was surrounded.

He killed a batch of reincarnation sandworms, but those reincarnation sandworms that were comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor quickly killed Ye Tian's reincarnation ancient snake copy body.

"The depths of this Void Treasure Land are indeed even more dangerous, no matter which direction you enter, you will encounter danger. "

However, the location of the Endless Sand Sea was the safest area for Ye Tian.

He can replicate the Will Reincarnation Sandworm and enter the endless sea of sand.

That way, he won't be in danger.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian copied a reincarnation sandworm comparable to the late cultivation of the Origin Upper Realm and went to the Endless Sand Sea.

Endless sea of sand.

When Ye Tian came in as a reincarnation sandworm replicating body, he really didn't encounter an attack.

Moreover, he can also constantly shuttle in the endless sea of sand.

Of course.

He has not forgotten his purpose, which is to find resources and treasures.

If there were treasures in the Endless Sand Sea, he would naturally want to get more treasures here.

On the surface, there seems to be nothing in the endless sea of sand, only this endless sand.

If something good is really born, it must be the bottom of the endless sea of sand.

The will of the Origin Realm was already suppressed in this treasure land, and the Endless Sand Sea also suppressed the will of the Origin Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian couldn't explore far, and could only enter the bottom of the Endless Sand Sea in person to find the treasures of the Endless Sand Sea.

"There are really treasures!"

Ye Tian found a lot of void passages at the bottom of the endless sand sea, where there were hidden caves in the sand sea, and there were many reincarnation sandworms living in many caves.

And some treasures have been bred here.

"This is reincarnation Shajin!"

This metal can be used to enhance the Arcana of the Other Side, but Ye Tian's Arcana has been upgraded to a high-level Arcana of the Other Side.

In terms of value, reincarnation of sand gold.

If it is taken out and traded, it is enough to make countless Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors go crazy!

"Reincarnation sand gold, like reincarnation ancient gold, has to be collected in large quantities!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian is looking for reincarnation Shajin.

As time passed, he did find a lot of reincarnation sand gold.

In addition to the reincarnation of Shajin, he also found some other resources.

"Now I have found too many resources and treasures, even if it is more than enough to build the Terran Sacred Pavilion into a top power in the land of eternity!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed the fluctuations of the battle in the endless sand sea, and this fluctuation spread over a huge area.

When he got closer, he realized that it was two groups of reincarnation sandworms fighting.

"Is this a turf grab?"

Ye Tian was curious.

The leaders of these two reincarnation sand worm clans are all very close to the existence of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and their strength is very strong, and Ye Tian is definitely not an opponent.

However, they are not here to grab turf.

Ye Tian snooped secretly, only to find out that they had discovered a reincarnation sand spring.

This reincarnation sand spring is incomparably precious, which is why they are contested.

This battle lasted for a long time, and finally one of the reincarnation sand worm tribes won and occupied the reincarnation sand spring.

And Ye Tian also mixed into the upper echelons of this reincarnation sand worm race, and was qualified to enter the reincarnation sand spring to cultivate, but only cultivated on the periphery of the reincarnation sand spring, and internally, only their leaders were qualified to cultivate.

After entering the inner cultivation of the reincarnation sand spring, he knew the role of the reincarnation sand spring.

"Temper the flesh!"

The reincarnation sand spring can help the reincarnation sand worm refine the physical body, and its strength will become stronger and stronger.

The reason why the leader of the reincarnation sandworm is so powerful is that the physical body has been tempered to a very terrifying degree, far surpassing other reincarnation sandworms.

"The spring water of the Reincarnation Sand Spring should also be good for the real body to copy the body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, there is no way for him to let the real body copy the body to cultivate here now, otherwise he will definitely be attacked by the reincarnation sandworm.

"I wonder if we can take the spring water out of here?"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he tried.

Grunt!!

A large amount of reincarnation sand spring water was sucked into the abdominal space of the reincarnation sand worm by Ye Tian, and after absorbing a lot, he left the reincarnation sand spring, and successfully brought it out.

"It works!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Other reincarnation sandworms don't do this, it's not necessary, the reincarnation sandworms who are qualified to enter the cultivation can cultivate there, there is no need to take the reincarnation sand spring water out!

Moreover, the reincarnation sandworm obeys the orders of the leader very much and will not mess around.

After some time.

Ye Tian brought a large amount of reincarnation sand spring water to the true body copy body, and let the real body copy body refine these reincarnation sand spring water.
